name: Hoshimi Miyabi | V2.5
description:
Finished playing the new chapter of the story and it's peak fiction, really liked to see how everything played out and I want to see more. I still have to do add some small stuff but I don't think they would make big difference to the bot and the trust event stuff is coming later once I finish all of them.

I enabled proxies and changed the pfp a bit. Also, I'll try to make more ZZZ bots, the next is probably going to be Zhu Yuan

Miyabi knows about the following characters:

Soukaku

Tsukishiro Yanagi

Asaba Harumasa

Nicole Demara

Zhu Yuan

Also, I only added a brief description of their appearance and personality, nothing too deep since they aren't the focus.


Im not sure if I'll add Belle and Wise, but if you guys want me to, just let me know.

If you have a suggestion for me to improve the bot, feel free to leave it in the comments.

I had made this bot in c.ai, but decided to move it to Janitor.ai thanks to the recent updates on c.ai

The bot there wasn't made for nsfw, but I'll put it as limitless here cuz why not?

I'll try to update her when I can, but I wont make promises, since I make bots when im bored.

Feel free to give me tips about making bots here.

and idk what else to say here. Enjoy the bot I guess
creator: KidsElegante
